EnglishDescription: It is recommended to go inside the Holy Kaaba. The Holy tradition says: Entering it (the Holy Kaaba) is (like) entering into Allah’s compassion and mercy and coming out of it is coming out of sins. The recommendation is stressed upon the one who is doing Hajj for the first time in his life. There is no recommendation for women.
RUrduDescription: Mustahab hai keh Khaana-e-Kaabe mein daakhil ho. Hadees-e-paak mein hai keh; Kaabe mein daakhil hona, Allah ki rehmat mein daakhil hone ke maanind (jaisa) hai aur us mein se baahar aana, gunaho’n se baahar aane jaisa hai. Yeh mustahab sirf us shakhs ke liye hai jo apni zindagi ka pehla Hajj anjaam de rata hai. Aurto’n ke liye yeh mustahab nahi hai.

EnglishDescription: Performing spiritual bath (Ghusl) before entering the Holy Kaaba.
RUrduDescription: Kaabe mein daakhil hone se pehle Ghusl kare.

RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA ANTA QULTA FEE KETAA-BEKA WA MAN DAKHA-LAHU KAANA AAAME-NAN FA-AAAMIN-NEE MIN A’ZAA-BEKA A’ZAA-BAN NAARE.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ اَنْتَ قُلْتَ فِیْ كِتَابِكَ وَمَنْ دَخَلَہٗ كَانَ آمِنًا فَآمِنِّیْ مِنْ عَذَابِكَ عَذَابَ النَّارِ۔

EnglishDescription: It is recommended for a person performing his first Hajj to recite this supplication in all four corners of Kaba.
RUrduDescription: Mustahab hai us shakhs ke liye jo apna pehla Hajj anjaam de raka hai keh Kaabe ke chaaro’n koney (4 corners) par is zikr ko adaa kare.

EnglishDescription: The following tradition narrated from Imam Sadiq (a) by Muawiyah bin Ammar says, If you want that Allah grant you a son, pour a bucket of ZamZam water on your head and body. Then go to the house of Allah and hold the chain of door and say…
RUrduDescription: Muawiyah bin Ammar ne Imam Sadiq (a) se riwaayat ki hai keh agar tum farzand chahte ho to ZamZam se bhari huwi bucket ka paani apne sar aur badan par daalo. Phir Allah ke ghar ke darwaaze ki janjeer (chain) pakad kar is tarah se kaho…

RArabic: ALLAAHUMMA INNAL BAIY-TA BAIY-TOKA WAL A’BDA A’B-DOKA WA QAD QULTA MAN DAKHALA-HU KAANA AAAME-NAN FA-AAAMI-NNEE MIN A’ZAA-BEKA WA AJIR-NEE MIN SAKHATE-KA.
ArabicText1: اَللّٰہُمَّ اِنَّ الْبَیْتَ بَیْتُكَ وَالْعَبْدَ عَبْدُكَ وَقَدْ قُلْتَ مَنْ دَخَلَہٗ كَانَ آمِنًا فَآمِنِّیْ مِنْ عَذَابِكَ وَاَجِرْنِیْ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ۔

EnglishDescription: Reciting 2 rakats of prayer near red stone (red marble slab) then come to the pillar opposite to the Black stone (Hajar-e-Aswad), keep your chest on it and say…
RUrduDescription: Laal patthar (red stone) ke qarib 2 rakat namaz adaa kare phir us pillar ke paas jaaye jo Hajar-e-Aswad ke muqaabil (saamne) hai, apne seene ko us par rakh kar kahe…

RArabic: YAA WAAHE-DO YAA AHA-DO YAA MAAJE-DO YAA QAREE-BO YAA BA-E’E-DO YAA A’ZEE-ZO YAA HAKEE-MO LAA TAZAR-NEE FARDAN WA ANTA KHAYRUL WAARE-SEENA WA HAB LEE ZURRIY-YATAN INNAKA SAMEE-U’D DO-A’AA-E.
ArabicText1: یَا وَاحِدُ یَا اَحَدُ یَا مَاجِدُ یَا قَرِیْبُ یَا بَعِیْدُ یَا عَزِیْزُ یَا حَكِیْمُ لَا تَذَرْنِیْ فَرْدًا وَاَنْتَ خَیْرُ الْوَارِثِیْنَ وَہَبْ لِیْ ذُرِّیَّۃً اِنَّكَ سَمِیْعُ الدُّعَآئِ۔

EnglishDescription: Then go around the pillar rubbing it with your back and stomach while reciting the above dua.
RUrduDescription: Phir us pillar ka chakkar lagaaye apni peet aur peyt ko usse mas (touch) kare aur uppar diye huwe jumle ko duraaye.

EnglishDescription: Perform 2 rakats of prayer on red marble between the two pillars. In the 1st rakat after <Surah Fateha> recite <Surah Ha Meem Sajdah> and in the 2nd rakat after <Surah Fateha> recite 55 ayats of Quran as this number is equal to the number of ayats in Surah Ha Meem Sajdah.
RUrduDescription: Do (2) pillar ke darmiyaan mein laal patthar (red marble) par 2 Rakat namaz adaa kare keh jis ki 1st rakat mein <Surah Fateha> ke baad <Surah Ha Meem Sajdah> padhe aur 2nd rakat mein <Surah Fateha> ke baad Quran-e-Majeed ki 55 aayate’n padhe keh jo Surah Ha Meem Sajdah ki aayato’n ki tadaad ke bara-bar hai.

EnglishDescription: Performing 2 rakats of prayer in each corner of Kaba.
RUrduDescription: Kaabe ke har koney (corner) par ja kar 2 rakat namaz padhe.

EnglishDescription: Also recite dua <Allahumma Man Tahaiyya-a> on each corner of Kaaba.
RUrduDescription: Kaabe ke har koney (corner) par dua <Allahumma Man Tahaiyya-a> bhi padhe.

EnglishDescription: If a person cannot reach all the four corners due to crowd, he should face the corner from his place.
RUrduDescription: Agar koi shakhs bheed (gardi) ki wajah se chaar (4) pillar tak na pohonch paaye to usey chahiye keh woh apni jagah se pillaro’n ki rukh kare.

EnglishDescription: Supplicate to Allah and seek ones desires from Allah while sitting at your place.
RUrduDescription: Apni jagah se Allah se mukhaatib ho kar apni haajaat talab kare.

EnglishDescription: Perform a prostration in Kaaba and recite dua <Laa Yaruddo Ghazabaka> of Imam Jafar Sadiq (a).
RUrduDescription: Khaan-e-Kaaba mein Sajdah baja laaye aur Imam Jafar Sadiq (a) ki dua <Laa Yaruddo Ghazabaka> padhe.

EnglishDescription: It is recommended to weep around and inside the Kaba. Imam Sadiq (a) says, Kaaba is called ’Bakka’ because people weep around it.
RUrduDescription: Mustahab hai keh Kaabe ke ird-gird aur andar girya kare. Imam Sadiq (a) farmate hai keh; Kaaba ko “Bakka” kaha jaata hai is liye keh log uske ird-gird girya karte (rotey) hai.

EnglishDescription: Saying takbeer (ALLAAHO AKBAR) thrice while coming out of Kaaba and recite this supplication narrated from Imam Sadiq (a)…:
RUrduDescription: Jab tum Kaabe se baahar aawo to 3 martaba takbeer (ALLAAHO AKBAR) kaho aur Imam Sadiq (a) ki is dua ko padho…

EnglishDescription: Recite this dua at the birth-place of Hazrat Ali (a)…
RUrduDescription: Hazrat Ali (a) ki wilaadat ki jagah par is dua ko padhe…

EnglishDescription: While coming out perform 2 rakats of prayer to the right of stairs. It is makrooh to spit or throw nasal discharge in the house of Allah.
RUrduDescription: Baahar aane ke waqt seedhi (stairs) ke daaheni taraf (right side) 2 rakat namaz adaa kare. Allah ke ghar mein thukna (spit) ya naak (nose) ki gandagi nikaalna makrooh hai.
